title: Microsoft Azure Training | Microsoft Azure Certification | MaxMunus
overview: MaxMunus’s Microsoft Azure Infrastructure Solutions Training is designed to help you pass the 70-533-Implementing Microsoft Azure Infrastructure Solutions , 70-534: Architecting Microsoft Azure Solutions and 70-535: Architecting Microsoft Azure Solutions Certification Exams. This Microsoft Azure training will make you an expert in Azure AD, Azure PowerShell, Azure Storage, Azure App Service, Azure Site Recovery, Azure SQL Database, Azure Cloud Service, Azure Automation, Azure resource Manage and Azure Virtual network using real life case studies.

title: Google Cloud Training | Google Cloud Certification | MaxMunus
overview: MaxMunus's Google Cloud Training help you to make the most of Google Cloud technologies. The course covers the Introducing of Google Cloud Platform, difference between Infrastructure-as-a- Service (IaaS) and Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS). It will also help you to understand the purpose of and use cases for Identity and Access Management. Virtual Machines and Networks in the Cloud will be covered in depth along with Storage, Container and Application of GCP. This course will also help you to do hands on during lab sessions, which will help you to learn the topics in a practical way.
